---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve.
_Example: "I always have to manually search for earnings dates…"_

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you'd like to see added.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you've thought of, and why you ruled them out.

## Additional context

Mockups, links, references, or anything else that helps explain the idea.
